Class CSVRecordingRunnable

java.lang.Object
lcr.business.CSVRecordingRunnable
All Implemented Interfaces:
Runnable
public class CSVRecordingRunnable extends Object implements Runnable
Consumer thread runnable that continuously pulls measurement data from a blocking queue and records it into a CSV file. Includes a drainage phase on shutdown. * @author sylkat

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    CSVRecordingRunnable(File targetFile, BlockingQueue<String[]> dataQueue)
    Constructs a CSV recording worker.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    run()
    Executes the main consumer loop, processing streaming data packets, followed by flushing out remaining elements upon shutdown.
    void
    stopRecording()
    Signals the recording loop to stop gracefully.

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Constructor Details

    • CSVRecordingRunnable

      public CSVRecordingRunnable(File targetFile, BlockingQueue<String[]> dataQueue)
      Constructs a CSV recording worker. * @param targetFile the destination file where CSV data will be saved
      Parameters:
      dataQueue - the thread-safe queue containing measurement data frames

    • stopRecording

      public void stopRecording()
      Signals the recording loop to stop gracefully.

      Executes the main consumer loop, processing streaming data packets, followed by flushing out remaining elements upon shutdown.
